'''âr-w-l-w''' ('''karawlewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:praelect|praelect]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-w-l-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:praelect|praelect]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-w-l-w
|-
! Lemma
| karawlewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirawlewoko|thirawlewoko]] || [[word:jirawlewoko|jirawlewoko]] || [[word:shirawlewoko|shirawlewoko]] || [[word:kirawlewoko|kirawlewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurawlewoko|thuthurawlewoko]] || [[word:jujurawlewoko|jujurawlewoko]] || [[word:shushurawlewoko|shushurawlewoko]] || [[word:kukurawlewoko|kukurawlewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurawlewoko|thurawlewoko]] || [[word:jurawlewoko|jurawlewoko]] || [[word:shurawlewoko|shurawlewoko]] || [[word:kurawlewoko|kurawlewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurawlewoko|thurawlewoko]] || [[word:jurawlewoko|jurawlewoko]] || [[word:shurawlewoko|shurawlewoko]] || [[word:kurawlewoko|kurawlewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therawlewoko|therawlewoko]] || [[word:jerawlewoko|jerawlewoko]] || [[word:sherawlewoko|sherawlewoko]] || [[word:kerawlewoko|kerawlewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorawlewoko|thothorawlewoko]] || [[word:jojorawlewoko|jojorawlewoko]] || [[word:shoshorawlewoko|shoshorawlewoko]] || [[word:kokorawlewoko|kokorawlewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorawlewoko|thorawlewoko]] || [[word:jorawlewoko|jorawlewoko]] || [[word:shorawlewoko|shorawlewoko]] || [[word:korawlewoko|korawlewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorawlewoko|thorawlewoko]] || [[word:jorawlewoko|jorawlewoko]] || [[word:shorawlewoko|shorawlewoko]] || [[word:korawlewoko|korawlewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrawlewoko|thĂŠrawlewoko]] || [[word:jĂŠrawlewoko|jĂŠrawlewoko]] || [[word:shĂŠrawlewoko|shĂŠrawlewoko]] || [[word:kĂŠrawlewoko|kĂŠrawlewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharawlewoko|thatharawlewoko]] || [[word:jajarawlewoko|jajarawlewoko]] || [[word:shasharawlewoko|shasharawlewoko]] || [[word:kakarawlewoko|kakarawlewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharawlewoko|tharawlewoko]] || [[word:jarawlewoko|jarawlewoko]] || [[word:sharawlewoko|sharawlewoko]] || [[word:karawlewoko|karawlewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharawlewoko|tharawlewoko]] || [[word:jarawlewoko|jarawlewoko]] || [[word:sharawlewoko|sharawlewoko]] || [[word:karawlewoko|karawlewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
